description: A dark, blue-tinted graphic with an enlarged, faded booking-style portrait of a bearded man filling the upper portion. A 'BORDER HAWK' logo sits at the center, and white serif headline text below reads 'Biden Illegal Charged With Raping Dead Girlfriend's Underage Daughter in Montana', with a small DHS seal at the bottom.
notable_text: BORDER HAWK; Biden Illegal Charged With Raping Dead Girlfriend's Underage Daughter in Montana
